# canControlQuickLookPanel()

**Instance Method**

Returns whether the view can automatically take control of the QuickLook panel.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func canControlQuickLookPanel() -> Bool
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true], if the view can display the Quick Look panel, otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## QuickLook Support

- **setCanControlQuickLookPanel(_:)**: Specifies whether the view can automatically take control of the QuickLook panel.
